name: Berlin
blurb: A city that rewards curiosity — world-class street food, brutalist history, and a nightlife scene that genuinely starts at 2am.

name: Potsdam
blurb: Prussian palaces and lakeside parks, 40 minutes from central Berlin by train — doable before lunch if you're efficient.

name: Porto
blurb: Port wine cellars, azulejo tiles, and a riverside that feels lived-in rather than staged for tourists.
